cover.headline_html: 3 myths that stall new GovCon shops.

myths.label: The Past Performance Trap
myths.myth_text: You need federal contracts on your résumé before GSA will look at you.
myths.reality_text: The MAS application is built on commercial past performance — not federal. Two solid commercial references and clean financials are what the contracting officer actually reviews.

myths.label: The 'It Finds You' Illusion
myths.myth_text: Once you're on the Schedule, agencies will search and find you.
myths.reality_text: The Schedule gets you in the room. It doesn't book the meeting. You still have to market, follow contracting officers, and respond to sources sought notices to generate revenue.

myths.label: The IT-Only Myth
myths.myth_text: GSA Schedule is really just for tech companies.
myths.reality_text: The Multiple Award Schedule covers professional services, construction, healthcare, staffing, office products, and more. If you have a commercial client base, there's likely a SIN for you.

close.close_question: Drop the myth you were carrying when you first looked at the GSA Schedule.

template_data.image_prompt: Carousel cover card. Dark navy background. Large bold headline centered: '3 MYTHS STALLING YOUR GOVCON START' in white, word 'MYTHS' in coral accent. Small top label in light gray: 'FIELD GUIDE / VOL. 04'. Bottom right: illustrated professional in blazer holding clipboard, confident posture. Badge centered near bottom: 'MYTHS EDITION' in cream text on darker band. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
